results.description: DESCRIPTION:THIS ACTION APPROVES AN AWARD IN THE AMOUNT OF $40,000 TO JACKSON STATE UNIVERSITY (JSU). THE PURPOSE OF THIS GRANT IS FOR JSU TO PROVIDE GRANT WRITING TECHNICAL ASSISTANCE TO UNDERSERVED COMMUNITIES IN, OR NEAR, JACKSON, MISSISSIPPI. FELLOWS WILL BE ASSIGNED TO MISSISSIPPI COMMUNITIES THAT NEED TECHNICAL ASSISTANCE IN GRANT RESEARCH, WRITING AND MAINTENANCE. THE ACTIVITIES TO BE PERFORMED INCLUDE ESTABLISHING GRANT WRITING TECHNICAL ASSISTANCE FOR UNDERSERVED COMMUNITIES, ASSESS THE SUCCESS OF THE PROGRAM, SUPPLY A WATER TAP FOR THE JSU/BLACKBURN MIDDLE SCHOOL LEARNING GARDEN, AND EXPAND TO OTHER HISTORICAL BLACK COLLEGES AND UNIVERSITIES. ANTICIPATED DELIVERABLES INCLUDE ESTABLISHING GRANT WRITING TECHNICAL ASSISTANCE, EXPANDING THE VARIETY OF VEGETABLES PRODUCED, GAIN A HIGHER CROP YIELD PER YEAR, PROVIDING MORE NUTRIENT RICH FOOD FOR COMMUNITY RESIDENTS, AND HOLDING ANNUAL GREENS COOK-OFFS AND STUDENT LED FARMERS MARKETS. INTENDED BENEFICIARIES INCLUDE THE RESIDENTS OF THE STATE OF MISSISSIPPI.ACTIVITIES:-SUBRECIPIENT:NO SUBAWARDS ARE INCLUDED IN THIS ASSISTANCE AGREEMENT.OUTCOMES:-
